free_text: Re-normalized data at 2.05 GeV were added to
Targets, with areas of about 2 x 2 cm and thicknesses
varying from 0.41 g/cm**2 to 4.8 g/cm**2, included pure
metals as well as organic materials. Included with the
target material itself were monitoring foils consisting
of 0.003 in. or 0.005 in. aluminium and usually
sections for tritium production in various substances
by 2.05 GeV proton have been measured. Re-normalized
Error in the monitor cross sections.
